alfred-10.name: Alfred 10
alfred-10.subtitle: All-in-One Battery Storage
alfred-10.shortDescription: Inverter and battery storage in one device (IP65, installation under 45 min.)
alfred-10.description: The Alfred 10 by Strong Energy is a modular, compact energy storage system suitable for both residential and commercial applications. With a powerful 10 kW inverter and a battery with up to 24 kWh storage capacity, Alfred 10 provides reliable energy supply – even in backup power mode at full capacity. Thanks to the integrated switchbox and plug & play functionality, the system is easy to install and ideal for flexible, space-saving applications. Awarded the Red Dot Design Award 2024.

highlights.title: Full Inverter Power
highlights.text: 10 kW in backup mode, black-start capable

highlights.title: Fast Modular Setup
highlights.text: Installation under 45 minutes, only 24 cm depth

highlights.title: 9.6 – 24 kWh Storage
highlights.text: Modularly expandable, 10,000 charge cycles

highlights.title: High Protection Class IP65
highlights.text: Suitable for indoor and outdoor installation

highlights.title: AC Coupling
highlights.text: Compatible with existing PV systems

highlights.title: German Support
highlights.text: Free hotline & 12-year warranty

star-q.name: Star Q
star-q.subtitle: Commercial Storage
star-q.shortDescription: 50 kW | 109.7 kWh | Floor mounted | Outdoor – scalable commercial storage solution for industry and business.
star-q.description: The Star Q is a powerful complete system with an integrated hybrid inverter (Solis S6-EH3P50K-H), designed for industrial and commercial applications. With 7 CATL battery modules (15.7 kWh each, 306 Ah), integrated fire suppression system and protection classes IP66 (inverter) and IP67 (battery modules), it offers the highest safety and reliability. The system supports peak shaving, self-consumption optimization, backup (50 kW) and is black-start capable. Scalable up to 6 systems in master/slave operation. Strong Energy is the official distribution partner for CNTE and CATL commercial storage in Europe.

highlights.title: IP66 Inverter / IP67 Battery Modules
highlights.text: Integrated fire suppression with smoke detector, gas detector & aerosol extinguishing system

highlights.title: 50 kW Power
highlights.text: 109.7 kWh storage capacity, scalable up to 6 systems (218 kWh battery expansion)

highlights.title: CATL Cells / Modules
highlights.text: LFP technology, ≥10,000 cycles, 95% DoD, 306 Ah

highlights.title: Solis EMS / Solis Cloud
highlights.text: Peak shaving, grid services & self-consumption optimization via Modbus TCP

highlights.title: Operating Range -25°C to +55°C
highlights.text: For indoor and outdoor installation

highlights.title: Up to 10-Year Warranty
highlights.text: 3-year warranty, extendable up to 10 years at additional cost

rows.label: Special Function
values: Simultaneous charging and backup supply at 50 kW each

rows.label: Max Short Circuit Current per MPPT (A)
Safety

star-h.name: Star H
star-h.subtitle: Commercial Storage
star-h.shortDescription: 115 kW | 232.5 kWh | Floor mounted | Outdoor – scalable commercial storage solution for industry and business.
star-h.description: The Star H-232 is a powerful complete system with YUNT MARS-125KT inverter (reduced to 115 kW), designed for industrial and commercial applications. With 5 CATL battery modules (46.5 kWh each, 280 Ah), integrated fire suppression system and protection classes IP20 (inverter), IP54 (cabinet) and IP65 (battery compartment), it offers the highest safety and reliability. Scalable up to 12 systems in master/slave operation. Strong Energy is the official distribution partner for CNTE and CATL commercial storage in Europe.

enerc.name: EnerC
enerc.subtitle: Commercial Storage
enerc.shortDescription: 3,794 kWh | 80 Modules | IP54 | Outdoor – scalable container commercial storage with CATL cells for industry and business.
enerc.description: The EnerC by Strong Energy is a container-based commercial storage system with 3,794 kWh capacity and 80 CATL modules. With an integrated fire suppression system, IP54 protection class and an operating range of -20°C to +55°C, it offers maximum safety and reliability. Compatible inverters from 100 kW to 1,725 MW are available.

enerc-plus.name: EnerC+
enerc-plus.subtitle: Commercial Storage
enerc-plus.shortDescription: 4,073 kWh | 80 Modules | IP54 | Outdoor – most powerful container commercial storage with CATL 306 Ah cells.
enerc-plus.description: The EnerC+ by Strong Energy is the most powerful variant of the container commercial storage program with 4,073 kWh capacity and 80 CATL modules at 306 Ah each. With an integrated fire suppression system, IP54 protection class and an operating range of -20°C to +55°C, it offers maximum safety and reliability. Compatible inverters from 100 kW to 1,725 MW are available.

hochvolt-bundle.name: High-Voltage Bundle
hochvolt-bundle.subtitle: Hybrid Inverter & HV Battery Storage
hochvolt-bundle.tagline: Complete package for your solar system
hochvolt-bundle.shortDescription: Hybrid inverter (8 kW / 15 kW) + HV battery storage (9.4 / 14 kWh) – Smart home compatible, Solar Manager ready.
hochvolt-bundle.description: The High-Voltage Bundle by Strong Energy combines a three-phase hybrid inverter with a high-voltage battery storage system into a powerful complete package. Compatible with Solar Manager and §14a EnWG compliant for grid-serving, regulation-compliant installations. With up to 98.2% efficiency, modular expandability and robust construction, the bundle is the ideal solution for residential solar systems.

highlights.title: High Efficiency
highlights.text: Up to 98.2% efficiency

highlights.title: Smart Home Compatible
highlights.text: Ready for the future!

highlights.title: Flexibly Expandable
highlights.text: Modular high-voltage system

highlights.title: Robust & Durable
highlights.text: Reliable construction

highlights.title: Easy Installation
highlights.text: Quick and straightforward

highlights.title: Solar Manager Compatible
highlights.text: §14a EnWG compliant

power-bank-s19.name: Power Bank S-19
power-bank-s19.subtitle: Portable Power Bank
power-bank-s19.shortDescription: 12,000 mAh | 140W PD3.1 | USB-C & USB-A | TFT Display – compact power for all devices.
power-bank-s19.description: The Power Bank S-19 by Strong Energy delivers reliable energy on the go with 12,000 mAh and up to 176W total output. Featuring PD3.1 fast charging via USB-C (140W), intelligent AI-powered temperature management, and a compact, portable design, it's the ideal companion for laptops, smartphones, and tablets. The TFT display shows charge level, temperature, and power in real time.

highlights.title: High Power 140W / 176W
highlights.text: Supports fast charging for multiple devices

highlights.title: Smart Power Distribution
highlights.text: Automatically adjusts output for efficient charging

highlights.title: Bidirectional Fast Charging
highlights.text: Charge and discharge via PD3.1 / 100W USB-C port

highlights.title: Large Capacity 12,000 mAh
highlights.text: Reliable energy for extended use

highlights.title: Compact & Portable Design
highlights.text: Easy to carry despite high power

highlights.title: Eco-Friendly Concept
highlights.text: Green energy and high energy efficiency

cp05st-3000w.name: CP05ST-3000W
cp05st-3000w.subtitle: Portable Power Station
cp05st-3000w.shortDescription: 2,350 Wh | 3,000W AC | LiFePO4 | 6,000+ Cycles – portable power station for home and outdoors.
cp05st-3000w.description: The CP05ST-3000W by Strong Energy is a powerful portable power station with up to 3,000W AC output and 2,350 Wh battery capacity. Thanks to automotive-grade LiFePO4 cells and over 6,000 charge cycles, it provides long-lasting, reliable power for almost any device – indoors and outdoors. Fast AC charging to 90% in just 1 hour. With integrated LED light, robust housing, and versatile ports (AC, DC, USB-A, USB-C, Solar), it's the ideal companion for camping, emergencies, and home use.

highlights.title: 3,000W Output Power
highlights.text: Powers almost any device at home and outdoors

highlights.title: 2,350 Wh Capacity
highlights.text: LiFePO4 cells with 6,000+ charge cycles

highlights.title: Fast Charging
highlights.text: AC charge to 90% in 1 hour

highlights.title: Solar Compatible
highlights.text: MPPT solar input 16–50V / 360W

highlights.title: Robust & Reliable
highlights.text: Automotive-grade LFP cells, rugged housing

highlights.title: Integrated LED Light
highlights.text: Powerful built-in LED lighting

cp03st-800w.name: CP03ST-800W
cp03st-800w.subtitle: Portable Power Station
cp03st-800w.shortDescription: 690 Wh | 800W AC | LiFePO4 | 2,000+ Cycles – compact portable power station with industrial build quality.
cp03st-800w.description: The CP03ST-800W by Strong Energy is a compact portable power station with 800W AC output (pure sine wave) and 690 Wh battery capacity. Thanks to LFP cells with over 2,000 charge cycles, it provides safe and long-lasting power. The robust aluminium housing protects against impacts and ensures durability. With bidirectional USB-C (100W PD), USB-A (QC3.0), DC outputs and solar charging support (MPPT), it's ideal for camping, outdoor adventures and emergency power.

highlights.title: 800W AC Output
highlights.text: Pure sine wave, 230V/50Hz – reliably powers sensitive devices

highlights.title: 690 Wh Capacity
highlights.text: LFP cells with 2,000+ charge cycles for long life

highlights.title: Robust Aluminium Housing
highlights.text: Impact-resistant and durable – industrial quality

highlights.title: USB-C Bidirectional 100W
highlights.text: Can be used as charge and discharge port (PD 100W)

highlights.title: Solar Charging (MPPT)
highlights.text: 11–30V, up to 84W – generate energy independently

highlights.title: Operating Temp -10°C to +40°C
highlights.text: Reliable even at low temperatures

rows.label: Included Accessories
values: AC charging cable, car charging cable

cs02st-100w.name: CS02ST-100W
cs02st-100w.subtitle: Foldable Solar Panel
cs02st-100w.shortDescription: 100W | 23% Efficiency | Foldable & Weatherproof – powerful solar panel for camping, hiking and outdoor use.
cs02st-100w.description: The CS02ST-100W by Strong Energy is a foldable solar panel with 100W power output and up to 23% efficiency. Compact and lightweight, ideal for camping, hiking and other outdoor activities. Rugged and weatherproof – waterproof and dustproof, suitable for extreme conditions. With overvoltage and short-circuit protection, certified to international safety standards. Includes MC4 cable and adapters for XT60, Anderson and DC5521.

highlights.title: 100W Power
highlights.text: Up to 23% efficiency for effective energy generation

highlights.title: Compact & Foldable
highlights.text: Lightweight and handy – ideal for camping and hiking

highlights.title: Rugged & Weatherproof
highlights.text: Waterproof and dustproof, suitable for extreme conditions

highlights.title: Safe to Use
highlights.text: Overvoltage and short-circuit protection, internationally certified
